headline: Goldman Flags 3 AI-Resistant Investment Themes to Watch
summary: Last week’s chip-led selloff showcased just how quickly sentiment on AI can shift and drive a rotation out of tech stocks. Goldman Sachs outlined three investment themes to play for investors worried about AI overexposure in their portfolio.
